hero.badge.description: Trust badge above the landing hero heading, stating Namefi is an ICANN-accredited registrar. Keep brand 'Namefi' and chain names 'Ethereum' & 'Base' untranslated.

hero.heading.description: Main landing hero heading pitching Namefi as a blockchain + AI domain platform. Keep brand 'Namefi' untranslated.

hero.subtitle.description: Landing hero subtitle/tagline beneath the heading, summarizing the value proposition.

hero.tryV3Beta.description: Landing hero link inviting users to try the new v3 beta search experience.

scrollIndicator.ariaLabel.description: Accessibility label (screen-reader only) for the landing scroll-down indicator that jumps to the 'Why Use Namefi' section. Keep brand 'Namefi' untranslated.

scrollIndicator.label.description: Visible text on the landing scroll-down indicator. Keep brand 'Namefi' untranslated.

floatingSearch.placeholder.description: Placeholder text inside the landing page's floating domain search input.

floatingSearch.searchButton.description: Label and tooltip for the search button on the landing page's floating search box.
